title: dimorphotheca walliana
intro: Dimorphotheca walliana, also known as the 'Wall's daisy', is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dimorphotheca walliana are said to include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures.
